// Note: Staging environment overrides. ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Staging selects this file in addition to appsettings.json. Connection strings here MUST point at the staging ConfigDb — never production. Real values should live in environment variables or a sealed file outside source control; this file is checked in as a structural template only.

Environment.Label: STAGING
Environment.// AllowedRoles: Comma-separated role names allowed to use this instance. Global admins (RPT_users.is_admin) are always allowed regardless of role. Empty / missing = no role gate (anyone authenticated can use it). Staging defaults to admin + QA only — extend the list if support engineers also need access.

Promotion.// AllowedSourceEnvironments: Comma-separated list of environment labels whose export packages this instance will accept on import. Staging itself accepts no imports by default — packages flow Staging → Production, not the other way.
